title: Windows Lateral Movement Timeline
description: Correlates SMB connections, remote service creation, and WinRM sessions to build a timeline of lateral movement activity across the environment.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ('Process Name' in ('psexec.exe', 'psexesvc.exe', 'winrs.exe', 'winrm.cmd') or 'Destination Port' in ('445', '5985', '5986', '3389') or 'Pipe Name' like '*PSEXEC*') | stats count as events, distinctcount('Destination IP') as targets, earliest(Time) as start_time, latest(Time) as end_time by 'Host Name', User | where targets >= 2 | sort -targets
notes: A single host connecting to multiple targets via SMB/WinRM/RDP is a strong lateral movement indicator. Map the timeline to identify the initial entry point.
